name: tethercode-workspace
description: TetherCode desktop and mobile development workspace

scripts.duplicates:check: npm run duplicates:mobile && npm run duplicates:native
scripts.contract:check: npm run agui:check && node scripts/validate-rpc-contract-fixtures.mjs && npm run test:contract -w @tethercode/mobile && cargo test --locked --manifest-path services/rust-bridge/Cargo.toml contract_fixture_manifest
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tethercode/mobile && cargo build --locked --release --manifest-path services/rust-bridge/Cargo.toml && cargo build --locked --release --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tethercode/mobile && cargo check --locked --manifest-path services/rust-bridge/Cargo.toml && cargo check --locked --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @tethercode/mobile && npm run duplicates:check && cargo fmt --check --manifest-path services/rust-bridge/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --all-features --manifest-path services/rust-bridge/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.test: npm run test:scripts && npm run test -w @tethercode/mobile && cargo test --locked --manifest-path services/rust-bridge/Cargo.toml -- --test-threads=1 && npm run desktop:test
